title: Dry Run Watch Story
summary: Small fixture manifest for validating the multi-video story-pack CLI path without encoding.

chapters.title: Hero Position
chapters.body: The first chapter establishes the object and starts the normalized scroll playhead.

chapters.title: Exploded Detail
chapters.body: The second chapter swaps to another clip while the DOM copy fades in place.

chapters.title: Reassembly
chapters.body: The last chapter proves one package can coordinate several all-keyframe videos.
